codeReview.summary: The feature adds a useful stage-specific probe inside SessionSshFixtureInstrumentedTest, but the committed proof is not reproducible from a clean test environment because this commit never provisions /data/local/tmp/aterm-fixture-client_key_legacy_pem, and the required follow-up note records implementation details that are not actually present in commit 1840b96.

issues.description: The new diagnostic proof reads /data/local/tmp/aterm-fixture-client_key_legacy_pem directly, but this commit never updates fixture preparation to create or push that file. In commit 1840b96, prepareFixtureClientKeyForAndroidTests still only pushes /data/local/tmp/aterm-fixture-client_key and /data/local/tmp/aterm-fixture-client_key.pub (app/build.gradle.kts:119-123), so the targeted rerun is not reproducible on a clean emulator and can only pass if a prior manual/local step already left the legacy PEM on-device. That misses the feature requirement to make the proof explicitly use the legacy PEM fixture path as part of the committed validation flow.

The required follow-up note does not accurately describe what commit 1840b96 changed. It says repo validation support was added for the legacy PEM fixture and that core/ssh and feature/session now include BouncyCastle/session-truthfulness changes, but git show --stat 1840b96 shows only this note plus SessionSshFixtureInstrumentedTest were changed. Because the task explicitly required recording the diagnostic outcome in this library note, these inaccurate statements make the handoff misleading for later workers and leave the mission's shared state out of sync with the actual implementation.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission shared-state note for this feature drifted away from the actual commit contents: it records fixture-preparation and coordinator/session changes that were not part of commit 1840b96.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/encrypted-imported-key-host-session-truthfulness-followup.md:1-3 claims fixture-prep and core/ssh + feature/session changes, while git show --stat 1840b96 reports only two touched files: the note itself and app/src/androidTest/kotlin/io/github/jtsang4/aterm/SessionSshFixtureInstrumentedTest.kt.

summary: Fail. The test-level probe usefully isolates TCP/auth/shell stages, but the committed rerun is not self-contained because the legacy PEM fixture path is never provisioned in this commit, and the required follow-up note overstates changes that are not actually in the reviewed diff.
